phonetic: k蓹藞mju藧n蓹l瑟z蓹m; 藞k蓲mj蓹n蓹l瑟z蓹m
examples: Communalism holds that social community has precedence over individuals.
Mr Vajpayee realises that stirring up communalism would merely drive minorities and secular-minded Hindus swiftly into Congress's ready embrace.
Our self-reliant ethic prevents our communalism from dulling our competitive edge.
There's no better example of that sort of spiritual communalism than SXSW where musicians and artists of all stripes gather to find some kind of connection.
